value.found_quote: `OTEL_METRICS_INCLUDE_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES` | Include keys from `OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES` as attributes on metric datapoints | `true`
value.rationale: The page describes resource attribute support for telemetry, including resource attributes as keys on metric datapoints and per-user attributes such as user.account_uuid via OTEL_METRICS_INCLUDE_ACCOUNT_UUID. This supports attributing usage/audit data to end users via resource attributes. While the exact phrasing "Attribute actions to your end users" does not appear verbatim, the page substantively describes the capability of per-user attribution through resource attributes.
